faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Stapleton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Stapleton residents most commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species often build nests in attics, under porches, in wall voids, and around the eaves of Stapleton's many older homes and buildings.
